subject: current-affairs
description: Obituaries 2025 MCQs for PPSC, FPSC, NTS, CSS & PMS.

mcqs.q: On 6 January 2025, Second Secretary at the _____ Embassy in Islamabad Thomas Fielder was found dead in his apartment.
mcqs.explanation: Thomas Fielder, Second Secretary at the Belarusian Embassy in Islamabad, was found dead in his apartment on 6 January 2025.

mcqs.q: On 5 February 2025, Prince Karim al-Hussaini Aga Khan IV — the _____ hereditary Imam of the Ismaili Muslim community — died at the age of 88.
mcqs.explanation: Prince Karim Aga Khan IV was the 50th hereditary Imam of the Ismaili Muslims.

mcqs.q: Former Supreme Court judge Justice Azmat Saeed Sheikh passed away on:
mcqs.explanation: Justice (R) Azmat Saeed Sheikh passed away on 12 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On 9 February 2025, Sam Nujoma — _____ first democratically elected president — died aged 95.
mcqs.explanation: Sam Nujoma was Namibia's first democratically elected president.

mcqs.q: On 9 February 2025, Prince Karim Aga Khan IV was laid to rest in _____ Aswan city.
mcqs.explanation: Aga Khan IV was buried in Aswan, Egypt on 9 February 2025.

mcqs.q: American cinema giant Gene Hackman was found dead on:
mcqs.explanation: Hollywood legend Gene Hackman was found dead on 27 February 2025.

mcqs.q: On 12 March 2025, _____ businessman Carl Lundström, co-founder of illegal file-sharing site The Pirate Bay, died.
mcqs.explanation: Carl Lundström was a Swedish businessman, co-founder of The Pirate Bay.

mcqs.q: On _____, former Law Minister and prominent lawyer Khalid Anwer passed away.
mcqs.explanation: Khalid Anwer, former Pakistani Law Minister, passed away on 13 March 2025.

mcqs.q: When did Shahid Mahar Shamsi (owner and editor-in-chief of Daily Kaleem) pass away?
mcqs.explanation: Shahid Mahar Shamsi passed away on 15 March 2025.

mcqs.q: On 21 March 2025, which American boxing legend, known for reclaiming the heavyweight title after retirement, passed away at age 76?
mcqs.explanation: American boxing legend George Foreman passed away on 21 March 2025 at age 76.

mcqs.q: Which former Foreign Secretary of Pakistan passed away on 28 March 2025?
mcqs.explanation: Najmuddin A. Shaikh, former Foreign Secretary of Pakistan, passed away on 28 March 2025.

mcqs.q: Which renowned psychiatrist passed away on 3 April 2025, after a prolonged illness following a stroke?
mcqs.explanation: Renowned Pakistani psychiatrist Dr Haroon Ahmed passed away on 3 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On 3 April 2025, former Pakistani Test cricketer Farooq Hameed passed away at age 80. He made his sole Test appearance for Pakistan in:
mcqs.explanation: Farooq Hameed played his only Test for Pakistan in 1964.

mcqs.q: On _____, former Supreme Court judge Sarmad Jalal Osmany passed away.
mcqs.explanation: Justice (R) Sarmad Jalal Osmany passed away on 21 April 2025.

mcqs.q: On _____, Pope Francis died aged 88.
mcqs.explanation: Pope Francis, head of the Catholic Church, died on 21 April 2025 aged 88.

mcqs.q: Renowned Punjabi poet Tajammul Kaleem breathed his last on:
mcqs.explanation: Punjabi poet Tajammul Kaleem passed away on 25 May 2025.

mcqs.q: Asif Azeem, who passed away on 23 May 2025, was the President of the Pakistan _____ Federation.
mcqs.explanation: Asif Azeem was the President of the Pakistan Softball Federation.

mcqs.q: On 14 May 2025, _____ former president José 'Pepe' Mujica passed away.
mcqs.explanation: Former Uruguayan president José 'Pepe' Mujica died on 14 May 2025.

mcqs.q: Veteran actor Ayesha Khan passed away in Karachi on:
mcqs.explanation: Veteran Pakistani actor Ayesha Khan passed away in Karachi on 19 June 2025.

mcqs.q: On 27 June 2025, a renowned political thinker, religious scholar and founder of an English-language daily passed away in Karachi. He was:
mcqs.explanation: Agha Murtaza Pooya — political thinker, religious scholar and founder of an English daily — passed away on 27 June 2025.
